description_long: This office building is a modern, rectangular structure with a minimalist facade dominated by tall, narrow windows arranged in a regular grid pattern. The front features a prominent glass double-door entrance flanked by large floor-to-ceiling windows, providing visibility into the ground floor interior. The side elevations are characterized by evenly spaced vertical windows, while the rear has a large expanse of wall with a wide set of windows and glass doors, likely leading to a meeting or lounge area. The building appears to have three stories, each with a consistent window rhythm, and the roof is flat, possibly accommodating rooftop utilities or a terrace. The exterior is finished in a smooth, light-colored material, likely concrete or stucco, with black window frames adding contrast. The interior is partially visible, showing office furniture and open-plan layouts typical of contemporary commercial spaces.
description: A modern, three-story office building with tall, narrow windows in a regular grid and a prominent glass entrance. The facade is minimalist, with a smooth light finish and black window frames.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main glass double-door entrance, large ground-floor windows, and a regular grid of tall, narrow windows above.
description_view_1: This side view displays a uniform array of vertical windows across all floors, with no visible entrance or architectural detailing.
description_view_2: The rear view is mostly a blank wall with minimal window openings, emphasizing the building's solid, monolithic appearance.
description_view_3: The opposite side features a wide set of windows and glass doors, likely for a meeting or lounge area, and a row of vertical windows on the upper floor.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular vertical grid of tall, narrow rectangular windows evenly spaced across all floors.
